name: timeline-panel
title: mcut Timeline Panel
description: Magnetic multi-track NLE timeline: filmstrip/waveform clips, snap guides, trim brackets, marquee multi-select, dnd-kit drop lanes, sortable tracks, ⌘+wheel zoom.

files.content:
export {
  addTextAtPlayhead,
  allElementIds,
  clipEdges,
  duplicateElement,
  duplicateSelection,
  elementForAsset,
  elementForTextPreset,
  insertElementAtPlayhead,
  insertElementOnNewTrack,
  insertElementOnTrack,
  isSoloTrack,
  removeSelection,
  selectTrackElements,
  shuttle,
  splitAllAtPlayhead,
  splitSelectionAtPlayhead,
  TEXT_PRESETS,
  toggleMasterKeyframe,
  toggleSoloTrack,
  trackOfSelection,
  trimSelectionToPlayhead,
  unlinkElements,
  type TextPreset,
} from "@mcut/editor";
